raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai paſchâ Stundâ tap-\
pe ſchis Wahrs padarrihts pahr\
Nebukadnezaru/ un wiꞥſch tap-\
pe no Zilwekeem atstumts/ un\
ehde Sahlt ka Wehrſchi/ un\
winna Meesas tappe no Debbes\
Raffas flazzinatas/ teekams win-\
na Matti auge ka Ehrgnu Spal-\
was/ un winna Naggi ka Put-\
nu Naggi."
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz ſcho Laiku va-\
zehlu es Nebukadnezars ſawas\
Azzis prett Debbeſim/ jo man-\
na Savrachana nahze atkaſ-\
erſch mannis/ un es tetzu to\
Wiſſu-augſtakn/ un flaweju un\
pagohdinaju to/ kas muhſchtgi\
dſihwo/ tapehz ka winna Wal-\
dischana ter weena muhſchiga\
Waldischana/ un winna Walſti-\
ba paleek lihos Raddu Raddeem."
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Semmes Ged-\
ſihwotaji irr tapatt ka neneeka/\
un wiſſch darra pehz ſawa Prah-\
ta ar to Debbeſ Spehku/ un ar\
teem Semmes Gedſihwotajeem/\
un neweens irr/ kas winna Roh-\
ku warretu pakaweht/ jeb us\
winnu fazzht: Ko darrt tu?"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tanni Laika nahze mans\
Prahts atkaſ eekſch manniu/ ir\
mannas Walſtibas Gohdiba/\
manna Augstiba un mans Spoh-\
ſchums nahze atkaſ us man/ un\
mannt Runnas-Kungi un War-\
renee mekleja mannis/ un es tap-\
pu manna Walſtiba atkaſ ee\
zelts/ un man tappe wehl leela-"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu flaweju es Nebukad-\
nezars/ un pa-augſtinajn/ ni-\
pagohdinaju to Kehniku no Deb-\
bes/ tapehz ka wiſſi winna Dar-\
bi Pateefiba/ un winna Zell-\
Taſniba irr/ wiſſch irr warren-\
tohs paſemmohſ/ kas eekſch Lep-\
nibas statga."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta V. Modalla.\n\
Belsazers ſagahna tohs Traufus ta Deew-\
Namma: 1/3 Redſ weenu Noſku preel\
ſcha nahkam/ un pee tahs balti darritas ſce-\
nas rakſtam: r. Bet neweens to warrej-\
laſht: 7. Kamehr Daniuels aizinaſto t-\
Rakſtu laſſa/un to Kehniku jowas Lepniba-\
pehz avrahſ: 13/22/25. Bet tai paſch-\
Makti tobſ wiſſch nokauts: 30.\n\
As Kehniſch Belsazer-\
darrija leelas Dſihre-\
flaweem tubkſtoscheen-\
Wirneeekeem/ un wiſſch dſehr-\
Wihnu ar teem tubkſtoscheem.\n\
2. Kad nu Belsazers to Wih-\
nu bij bandiſ/ tab pawehleje-\
wiſſch/ ka bij tohs ſudraba un-\
ſelta Rihkus atneſt/ ko winna-\
Tehws Nebukadnezars no t-\
Deewa Namma/ kas Jeruſale-\
me biſis/ bij aiſweddiſ/ ka ta-\
Kehniſch un winna Warrenee-\
un winna Seewas/ un winna-\
leekas Seewas no teem dſertu.\n\
3. Ta tappe atneſti tee ſelta-\
Rihkt/ kas no ta Deewa Nam-\
ma/ kas Jeruſalemē biſis/ biſi-\
aiſwesti/ un tas Kehniſch/ un-\
winna Warrenee/ un winna-\
Seewas/ un winna leekas See-\
was dſehre no teem.\n\
4. Tee dſehre to Wihun/ un-\
flaweja tohs ſelta- un ſudraba-"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
